description_long: This is a large, specialized police vehicle designed for transporting multiple cars, commonly known as a police car carrier or car transporter. The cab is painted blue with the word 'POLICE' prominently displayed on the front and sides, and the trailer section is metallic gray with blue and yellow accents. The trailer features a grated metal ramp and platform, with raised side rails and vertical supports for securing vehicles during transport. The vehicle has six wheels, with two axles at the rear and one at the front, and the overall structure is robust and industrial, suitable for heavy-duty use. There are no visible emergency lights or sirens, but the police markings are clear and bold. The surface appears metallic and hard, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish.
description: A large blue and gray police car carrier truck with 'POLICE' markings, grated metal ramp, and robust structure for vehicle transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue cab with 'POLICE' text and the start of the grated metal ramp.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the car carrier platform, blue and yellow accents, and multiple wheel axles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the grated ramp and open platform for loading vehicles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the length of the carrier and structural supports.
attribute_police_markings: The word 'POLICE' is prominently displayed in white block letters on the front of the cab and on the side panels of the trailer. The markings are clear, bold, and easily visible against the blue background. There are also yellow accent stripes along the side of the trailer.
